name: South Florida
author: kaicardenas0618
description:
South Florida (SFL)

South Florida is a map spanning from Homestead / Florida City to West Palm Beach, covering the core of the Miami–Fort Lauderdale–Palm Beach metro region.

Overview

  • Population: 3,454,784
  • Pops: 305.679
  • Demand Points: 5,480
